metadata.description: Batch 29 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 2801-2900; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: on or to an upper floor
towards a higher position
words.definitionTh: ขึ้นข้างบน

words.definitionEn: relating to a town or city
words.example: The factory is near an urban area.

words.definitionEn: to strongly encourage; a strong desire
words.definitionTh: กระตุ้น / ความต้องการอย่างแรง
words.example: We urge operators to report defects.

words.definitionEn: used to refer to the speaker and others as an object
to employ something for a purpose; the act of using
words.definitionTh: ใช้ / การใช้

words.definitionEn: previously owned or employed for a purpose
words.definitionTh: ที่ใช้แล้ว / เคย

words.definitionEn: helping to achieve a purpose
words.definitionTh: มีประโยชน์

words.definitionEn: a person who uses a product or system
normal or expected
in the normal or expected way
a period spent away from work for rest
words.definitionTh: วันหยุดพักผ่อน
words.example: She is on vacation this week.

words.definitionEn: a low area of land between hills
words.example: The road crosses a wide valley.

words.definitionEn: worth a lot or very useful
importance, worth, or a numerical amount; to consider important
words.definitionTh: คุณค่า / ให้คุณค่า

words.definitionEn: a medium-sized road vehicle
words.example: The equipment arrived in a van.

words.definitionEn: a range of different types
words.definitionTh: ความหลากหลาย
words.example: The factory produces a variety of products.

words.definitionEn: of several different kinds
to change or differ
extremely large in area or amount
words.example: The system stores a vast amount of data.

words.definitionEn: a plant or part of a plant eaten as food
words.example: Add a fresh vegetable to the meal.

words.definitionEn: a machine used for transporting people or goods
words.example: The vehicle stopped at the gate.

words.definitionEn: a place where an event happens
words.definitionTh: สถานที่จัดงาน

words.definitionEn: a particular form of a product or document
to a high degree
by way of or through
a person harmed by an event or crime
success in a competition or struggle
a recording of moving images
an opinion or what can be seen; to look at
words.definitionTh: มุมมอง / ดู
words.example: The dashboard provides a clear view.

words.definitionEn: a person who watches television or visual content
words.example: The viewer can filter the chart.

words.definitionEn: a small community in the countryside
words.example: The supplier is based in a small village.

words.definitionEn: behaviour intended to hurt or damage
words.definitionTh: ความรุนแรง

words.definitionEn: using or involving physical force to harm
words.example: The process must avoid violent movement.

words.definitionEn: created by computers or existing mainly online
words.definitionTh: เสมือนจริง
words.example: The training was held in a virtual room.

words.definitionEn: a tiny infectious agent or harmful computer program
words.example: The security tool detected a computer virus.

words.definitionEn: able to be seen
words.definitionTh: มองเห็นได้

words.definitionEn: the ability to see or a clear plan for the future
words.definitionTh: วิสัยทัศน์ / การมองเห็น

words.definitionEn: to go to see a person or place; an occasion of doing so
words.definitionTh: เยี่ยมชม / การเยี่ยม
words.example: The supplier will visit the factory tomorrow.

words.definitionEn: a person who goes to see a place or person
words.definitionTh: ผู้เยี่ยมชม
words.example: Each visitor must wear a badge.

words.definitionEn: relating to seeing or images
words.example: The system gives a visual warning.

words.definitionEn: extremely important or necessary
a natural substance needed for health
sound produced by speaking or singing
the amount of space or level of sound
words.definitionTh: ปริมาตร / ระดับเสียง

words.definitionEn: a person who freely offers to help; to offer freely
words.example: A volunteer helped with the event.

words.definitionEn: to choose formally; a formal choice
words.definitionTh: ลงคะแนน / คะแนนเสียง
words.example: The team voted for the new design.

words.definitionEn: regular payment for work, usually hourly or weekly
words.example: The company reviewed the hourly wage.

words.definitionEn: to stay until something happens
a man who serves food in a restaurant
words.definitionTh: พนักงานเสิร์ฟชาย

words.definitionEn: to stop sleeping; to cause someone to stop sleeping
words.example: Wake up before the morning shift.

words.definitionEn: to move on foot; a journey on foot
words.example: Walk only in the marked area.

words.definitionEn: a vertical structure forming a side or boundary
words.example: Mount the screen on the wall.

words.definitionEn: to wish for or need something
armed fighting between countries or groups
words.example: The museum has an exhibition about the war.

words.definitionEn: having a comfortable amount of heat
words.example: Keep the product in a warm place.

words.definitionEn: to tell someone about possible danger
words.example: The alarm warns operators about danger.

words.definitionEn: a statement about possible danger
words.example: Do not ignore the safety warning.

words.definitionEn: to clean with water
the activity of cleaning with water
words.definitionTh: การซักล้าง

words.definitionEn: unwanted material; to use carelessly
words.definitionTh: ของเสีย / สูญเปล่า

words.definitionEn: to look at carefully; a small timepiece
words.definitionTh: ดู / นาฬิกา

words.definitionEn: the clear liquid needed by living things
a moving ridge of water; to move a hand in greeting
words.definitionTh: คลื่น / โบก
words.example: The signal appears as a wave.

words.definitionEn: a method, route, or manner
words.example: This is the safest way to proceed.

words.definitionEn: used by a speaker to refer to a group including themselves
not strong
a lack of strength or a disadvantage
words.definitionTh: ความอ่อนแอ
words.example: The review identified a design weakness.

words.definitionEn: a large amount of money or valuable possessions
words.definitionTh: ความมั่งคั่ง
words.example: The region gained wealth from trade.

words.definitionEn: having a lot of money or resources
words.example: The area has several wealthy residents.

words.definitionEn: an object used to cause harm
to have clothing on the body
words.example: Wear safety glasses in the area.

words.definitionEn: conditions such as rain, heat, and wind
a system of connected Internet pages
words.example: The dashboard runs on the web.

words.definitionEn: a collection of related pages on the Internet
words.example: The information is available on the website.

words.definitionEn: a ceremony in which two people marry
words.definitionTh: งานแต่งงาน
words.example: They attended a wedding on Saturday.

words.definitionEn: the day after Tuesday
a period of seven days
Saturday and Sunday
words.definitionTh: วันหยุดสุดสัปดาห์
words.example: Maintenance is planned for the weekend.

words.definitionEn: happening once a week
words.definitionTh: รายสัปดาห์
words.example: The team holds a weekly review.

words.definitionEn: to measure how heavy something is
words.definitionTh: ชั่งน้ำหนัก

words.definitionEn: how heavy something is
to greet someone gladly; accepted with pleasure
words.definitionTh: ยินดีต้อนรับ

words.definitionEn: in a good condition or manner
words.definitionTh: ดี / อย่างดี

words.definitionEn: the direction opposite east
words.definitionTh: ทิศตะวันตก
words.example: The warehouse is west of the plant.

words.definitionEn: located in or from the west
words.definitionTh: ทางตะวันตก
words.example: The supplier serves the western region.

words.definitionEn: covered with or containing water
used to ask for information about a thing
anything or no matter what
a circular object that turns around an axle
at what time or on the occasion that
words.example: Stop the line when the alarm sounds.

words.definitionEn: at any time that
words.definitionTh: เมื่อใดก็ตาม
words.example: Call maintenance whenever the fault appears.

words.definitionEn: in or to what place
in contrast with the fact that
words.definitionTh: ในขณะที่ / แต่
words.example: Camera A is fast, whereas Camera B is more accurate.

words.definitionEn: in or to any place
words.definitionTh: ที่ใดก็ตาม
words.example: Install guards wherever access is possible.

words.definitionEn: used to introduce alternatives or doubt
words.definitionTh: ว่า...หรือไม่
words.example: Check whether the sensor is active.

words.definitionEn: used to ask or refer to a choice
words.definitionTh: ซึ่ง / อันไหน

words.definitionEn: during the time that or although
words.example: Monitor the line while it is running.

words.definitionEn: to speak very quietly
words.example: Do not whisper during the briefing.

words.definitionEn: having the colour of snow or milk
words.example: The product has a white label.
